sections.sectionTitle: Israel-te a Phazah Moab-ah a Kisimna

verses.text: Tua gimna khit ciangin Topa in Moses tung leh siampi Aaron' tapa Eleazar tungah
“Israel mihonte khempeuh kum sawmnih pan a tungsiah, a behbehin, Israel sung panin galdo dingin a kuankhia thei ding khempeuh sim in,” a ci hi
Moses leh siampi Eleazar in Jerikho nai, Jordan kiang, Moab zanglei-ah amaute' tungah thu gen a
Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin, “Kum sawmnih pan a tungsiah peuhmah mi sim un,” a ci hi. Egypt gam panin a paikhia Israel mite
Israel' tacil Reuben hi a, Reuben' tapate: Hanok pan Hanok behte ahi uh hi; Pallu pan Pallu behte ahi uh hi
Hezron pan Hezron behte ahi uh hi; Karmi pan Karmi behte ahi uh hi
Hihte khempeuh pen Reuben minam ahi uh hi; amau mi tul sawmli leh tul thum leh za sagih leh sawmthum pha hi
Pallu' tapa Eliab ahi hi

Eliab' tapate pen Nemuel, Dathan, leh Abiram ahi uh hi. Hih Dathan leh Abiram pen, mihonte lak panin pawl a kai, amaute in Topa' thu a seel lai-in Korah tawh kipawlin Moses leh Aaron' thu a seelte ahi uh hi
Mei in mihing zanih leh sawmnga a kattum lai-in lei in a kam ka-in Korah tawh amaute valh tumin amau pawl teng si uh a, amaute pen hilhkholhna a suak uh hi
Ahi zongin Korah' tapate silo uh hi
Amau' behbehin Simeon minamte: Nemuel pan Nemuel behte ahi uh hi; Jamin pan Jamin behte ahi uh hi; Jakhin pan Jakhin behte ahi uh hi
Zerah pan Zerah behte ahi uh hi; Shaul pan Shaul behte ahi uh hi
Hihte pen Simeon minam hi uh a, mi tul sawmnih leh tul nih leh zanih ahi uh hi
Amau' behbehin Gad minamte: Zefon pan Zefon behte ahi uh hi; Haggi pan Haggi behte ahi uh hi; Shuni pan Shuni behte ahi uh hi
Ozni pan Ozni behte ahi uh hi; Eri pan Eri behte ahi uh hi
Arod pan Arod behte ahi uh hi; Areli pan Areli behte ahi uh hi
Hihte pen Gad minamte hi a, mi tul sawmli leh zanga ahi hi
Judah' tapate pen Er leh Onan hi a, Kanaan gamah Er leh Onan si uh hi
Amau' behbehin Judah minamte in: Shelah pan Shelah behte ahi uh hi; Perez pan Perez behte ahi uh hi; Zerah pan Zerah behte ahi uh hi
Perez mite: Hezron pan Hezron behte ahi uh hi; Hamul pan Hamul behte ahi uh hi
Hihte pen Judah minamte hi a, mi tul sawmsagih leh tul guk leh zanga ahi uh hi
Amau' behbehin Issakhar minamte: Tola pan Tola behte ahi uh hi; Puvah pan Puvah behte ahi uh hi
Jashub pan Jashub behte ahi uh hi; Shimron pan Shimron behte ahi uh hi
Hihte pen Issakhar minamte hi a, mi tul sawmguk leh tul li leh zathum ahi uh hi
Amau' behbehin Zebulun minamte: Sered pan Sered behte ahi uh hi; Elon pan Elon behte ahi uh hi; Jahleel pan Jahleel behte ahi uh hi
Hihte pen Zebulun minamte hi a, mi tul sawmguk leh zanga ahi uh hi
Amau' behbehin Josef minamte: Manasseh leh Efraim ahi uh hi
Manasseh minamte: Makhir pan Makhir behte ahi uh hi; Makhir pen Gilead' pa ahi hi; Gilead pan Gilead behte ahi uh hi
Gilead' suante: Iezer pan Iezer behte ahi uh hi
Asriel pan Asriel behte ahi uh hi; Shekhem pan Shekhem behte ahi uh hi
Shemida pan Shemida behte ahi uh hi; Hefer pan Hefer behte ahi uh hi
Tu-in Hefer' tapa Zelofehad in tapa neilo a, ahih hangin tanu nei hi: Zelofehad' tanute' minte in Mahlah, Noah, Hoglah, Milkah, leh Tirzah ahi hi
Hihte pen Manasseh minamte hi a, mi tul sawmnga leh tul nih leh za sagih ahi hi
Amau' behbehin Efraim minamte: Suthelah pan Suthelah behte ahi uh hi; Bekher pan Bekher behte ahi uh hi; Tahan pan Tahan behte ahi uh hi
Suthelah minamte: Eran pan Eran behte ahi uh hi
Hihte pen Efraim minamte hi a, mi tul sawmthum leh tul nih leh zanga ahi hi. Hihte pen amau' behbehin Josef minamte ahi hi
Amau' behbehin Benjamin minamte: Bela pan Bela behte ahi uh hi; Ashbel pan Ashbel behte ahi uh hi; Ahiram pan Ahiram behte ahi uh hi
Shefufam pan Shefufam behte ahi uh hi; Hufam pan Hufam behte ahi uh hi
Bela' tapate pen Ard leh Naaman ahi uh hi: Ard pan Ard behte ahi uh hi; Naaman pan Naaman behte ahi uh hi
Hihte pen amau' behbehin Benjamin minamte hi a, mi tul sawmli leh tul nga leh zaguk ahi hi
Amau' behbehin Dan minamte: Shuham pan Shuham behte hi a, hihte pen Dan minamte ahi uh hi
Dan minam sung pan Shuham behte mi tul sawmguk leh tul li leh za li ahi hi
Amau' behbehin Asher minamte: Imnah pan Imnah behte ahi uh hi; Ishvi pan Ishvi behte ahi uh hi; Beriah pan Beriah behte ahi uh hi
Beriah minamte: Heber pan Heber behte ahi uh hi; Malkhiel pan Malkhiel behte ahi uh hi
Asher' tanu' min Serah ahi hi
Hihte pen Asher minamte hi a, tul sawmnga leh tul thum leh za li ahi hi
Amau' behbehin Naftali minamte: Jahzeel pan Jahzeel behte ahi uh hi; Guni pan Guni behte ahi uh hi
Jezer pan Jezer behte ahi uh hi; Shillem pan Shillem behte ahi uh hi
Hihte pen Naftali minamte hi a, mi tul sawmli leh tul nga leh za li ahi hi
Hihte pen Israel mi vekpi a phazah hi a, mi tul za guk leh tul khat leh za sagih leh sawmthum ahi uh hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Mi a phazah tawh kizui-in hih mite tungah luah dingin leitang kihawm ding hi
Minam a tamte tungah gamh a tam na pia ding a, minam a tawmte tungah gamh a tawm na pia ding hi. Minam khempeuh a mi phazah tawh kizui-in gamh kipia ding hi
Ahih hangin leitang pen aisaanna tawh kihawm ding a, amau' beh min tawh kizui-in amaute in luah ding uh hi
Aisaanna tawh kizui-in a tamte tungah a tam, a tawmte tungah a tawm, a gamh uh kihawmsak ding hi,” a ci hi.
Amau' behbehin a kisim Levi minamte: Gershon pan Gershon behte ahi uh hi; Kohath pan Kohath behte ahi uh hi; Merari pan Merari behte ahi uh hi
Amau' suante: Libni behte, Hebron behte, Mahli behte, Mushi behte, leh Korah behte ahi uh hi. Kohath pen Aram' pa ahi hi
Amram' zi pen Levi sung pan Egypt gamah a suak ahi Levi' tanu Jokhebed ahi hi. Tuanu in Amram tawh Aaron, Moses, leh a sanggamnu uh Miriam nei hi
Aaron in ta Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar, leh Ithamar nei hi
Ahih hangin Nadab leh Abihu pen amaute in Topa' mai-ah mei siangtholo a piak lai-un si uh hi

Pasal peuhmah kha khat pan a tungsiah, amau' sung pan a kisimte, tul sawmnih leh tul thum ahi hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite lakah amaute gamh kipialo ahih manin Israel mite lakah amaute kisimkhawm lo hi.
Jerikho nai Jordan kiang Moab zanglei-ah Israel mite a sim Moses leh siampi Eleazar mah in a sim mite pen hihte ahi uh hi
Ahih hangin Sinai sehnel gamah Israel mite a sim Moses leh Aaron in a simte lakah tu-in khat zong kihel nawnlo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in amaute' thu a genna-ah, “Amaute gamlakah si ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Jefunneh' tapa Kaleb leh Nun' tapa Joshua lobuang amaute khat beek om nawnlo hi.
